columns.name: owner
columns.comment: routing — caps-only sync. null = device-local trust-set row (not synced); admin-identity id = network roster row (syncs to admin-identity members)

columns.name: signer_did
columns.comment: did:key — peer/member identity

columns.name: device_label
columns.comment: e.g. MacBook M1 — self-published device label (admin-identity roster) / local label (trust-set)

columns.name: account_name
columns.comment: self-published member display name in the admin-identity roster (null for plain trust-set rows). Sealed-by-default so a blind replica can't read names — see board idea 0009.

columns.name: kind
columns.comment: local | remote

columns.name: signer_type
columns.comment: how this signer's key is held — apple_se (Apple Secure Enclave, a human device) | env_seed (AVEN_SERVER_SEED, a server/aven node) | security_key | recovery_phrase. null/absent = treated as apple_se (human). Drives the ≥1-human-owner anti-lockout guard.

columns.name: added_at_ms
columns.comment: local allowlist metadata

columns.name: status
columns.comment: pending | active | revoked

columns.name: owner
columns.comment: routing — keyshare lookup

columns.name: dek_version
columns.comment: routing — DEK version line

columns.name: recipient_did
columns.comment: routing — recipient DID

columns.name: wrapper_did
columns.comment: routing — granter DID for KEK derivation

columns.name: wrapped_dek
columns.comment: routing — wrapped DEK blob

columns.name: owner
columns.comment: routing — SAFE row identity (self-owned)

columns.name: type
columns.comment: human | aven | spark — the kind of SAFE

columns.name: safe_did
columns.comment: did:safe:<uuid> — stable public SAFE identifier

columns.name: wrap_did
columns.comment: did:key of the SAFE wrap keypair — the public key granters wrap this SAFE's inbound DEK keyshares to (the did:safe: member primitive)

columns.name: wrap_privkey_b64
columns.comment: sealed — ed25519 seed of the SAFE wrap keypair; only members (DEK holders) open it to unwrap SAFE-addressed keyshares

columns.name: username_slug
columns.comment: human-identity profile handle (null for aven)

columns.name: name
columns.comment: sealed at rest

columns.name: issuer_pubkey_b64
columns.comment: sealed — biscuit root Ed25519 public key (URL-safe base64)

columns.name: genesis_b64
columns.comment: sealed — biscuit chain

columns.name: current_dek_version
columns.comment: routing — active DEK line for seal/hydrate

columns.name: created_at_ms
columns.comment: identity row metadata

columns.name: owner
columns.comment: routing — the controlled SAFE; rows sync to exactly its members

columns.name: controller_did
columns.comment: did:safe:<uuid> of the controller this row copies

columns.name: role
columns.comment: owner | delegate | executor | reader

columns.name: genesis_b64
columns.comment: sealed at rest — COPY of the controller's biscuit chain, readable by THIS SAFE's members so they can resolve the did:safe: path offline (N-hop authorize + verify-on-apply)

columns.name: issuer_pubkey_b64
columns.comment: sealed at rest — the controller chain's root Ed25519 public key

columns.name: added_at_ms
columns.comment: controller admission timestamp

columns.name: owner
columns.comment: routing — ACC + sync

columns.name: owner
columns.comment: routing — biscuit + P2P sync

columns.name: created_at_ms
columns.comment: sealed at rest

columns.name: author_did
columns.comment: sealed at rest

columns.name: body
columns.comment: sealed at rest

columns.name: role
columns.comment: sealed at rest; author kind: "user" | "agent" (null/absent on legacy rows = user). Plain text, NOT enum: the add-only migration lens fills a generic Text default that an enum's variant gate rejects (`expected Enum, got Some(Text)`).

columns.name: owner
columns.comment: routing — ACC + sync

columns.name: intent_id
columns.comment: sealed at rest

columns.name: filename
columns.comment: sealed at rest

columns.name: mime_type
columns.comment: sealed at rest

columns.name: size_bytes
columns.comment: sealed at rest

columns.name: created_at_ms
columns.comment: sealed at rest

columns.name: content
columns.comment: sealed at rest — IPC JSON uses base64

columns.name: owner
columns.comment: routing — ACC + sync (one brain per SAFE)

columns.name: content
columns.comment: sealed at rest — verbatim memory text

columns.name: embedding
columns.comment: sealed at rest — packed-f32 embedding (base64 inside the AEAD payload; dim lives in the payload)

columns.name: stream
columns.comment: sealed at rest — surface the memory came from (talk | note | self | …)

columns.name: author_role
columns.comment: sealed at rest — author kind of the origin artifact (user | agent)

columns.name: source
columns.comment: sealed at rest — origin artifact row id

columns.name: seq
columns.comment: sealed at rest — position in the origin artifact (decimal string; logical integer)

columns.name: line_start
columns.comment: sealed at rest — origin line range start (decimal string; logical integer)

columns.name: line_end
columns.comment: sealed at rest — origin line range end (decimal string; logical integer)

columns.name: content_date
columns.comment: sealed at rest — domain time, ms since epoch

columns.name: content_hash
columns.comment: routing — keyed-MAC dedup key (HKDF(DEK)-PRF over content): equality-searchable by members, opaque to disk and the blind relay

columns.name: source_version
columns.comment: sealed at rest — origin artifact version (decimal string; logical bigint)

columns.name: normalize_version
columns.comment: sealed at rest — normalizer version (decimal string; logical integer)

columns.name: veracity
columns.comment: sealed at rest — trust class: stated | inferred | imported | tool | unknown

columns.name: superseded_by
columns.comment: sealed at rest — replacement memory row id; hot path filters IS NULL (null-ness is metadata)

columns.name: importance
columns.comment: sealed at rest — salience 0..1 chosen at write (decimal string; null scores as 0.5) — bounded rank modifier (board 0025)

columns.name: owner
columns.comment: routing — ACC + sync

columns.name: name
columns.comment: sealed at rest — entity name

columns.name: kind
columns.comment: sealed at rest — entity kind (person | org | topic | unknown | …)

columns.name: properties
columns.comment: sealed at rest — JSON properties as a sealed text payload

columns.name: owner
columns.comment: routing — ACC + sync

columns.name: from
columns.comment: sealed at rest — source row id (graph topology is content, not routing)

columns.name: to
columns.comment: sealed at rest — target row id

columns.name: kind
columns.comment: sealed at rest — registered link kind (mentions | assoc | claim predicates)

columns.name: class
columns.comment: sealed at rest — note | claim | bond

columns.name: valid_from
columns.comment: sealed at rest — claim validity start, ms since epoch

columns.name: valid_to
columns.comment: sealed at rest — claim validity end, ms since epoch; NULL = currently true

columns.name: confidence
columns.comment: sealed at rest — claim confidence (decimal string; logical double)

columns.name: strength
columns.comment: sealed at rest — bond strength (decimal string; logical double)

columns.name: stability
columns.comment: sealed at rest — bond stability (decimal string; logical double)

columns.name: access_count
columns.comment: sealed at rest — bond co-access count (decimal string; logical bigint)

columns.name: last_access
columns.comment: sealed at rest — last potentiation, ms since epoch (decimal string)

columns.name: source_memory
columns.comment: sealed at rest — evidence memory row id

columns.name: owner
columns.comment: routing — ACC + sync

columns.name: message_id
columns.comment: sealed — the user message row this context served

columns.name: reply_id
columns.comment: sealed — the agent reply row

columns.name: trace
columns.comment: sealed — ContextTrace JSON: decision log (ids/via/rank/score/budget) + assembly watermark; state-as-of replays from engine row histories

columns.name: created_at_ms
columns.comment: sealed at rest
